ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task associated with the metric */,
  "patch_start" INTEGER /* Start of the patch range for the task */,
  "patch_end" INTEGER /* End of the patch range for the task */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset used for pagination */,
  "limit" INTEGER /* Limit of records to retrieve */,
  "count_ms" INTEGER /* Time taken to process the task in milliseconds */,
  "lookup_mus" INTEGER /* Time taken for lookups in microseconds */,
  "results" INTEGER /* Number of results returned from the task */,
  "processing_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the task processing */,
  "processing_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the task processing */,
  "resource_usage" REAL /* Resource usage during task processing (e.g., CPU, memory) */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors encountered during task processing */,
  "error_details" TEXT /* Details of errors encountered during task processing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task being executed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the task was created */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., data aggregation, data cleanup) */,
  "task_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the task (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric associated with the alert */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active/inactive) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "alert_recipients" TEXT /* List of recipients for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric referenced in the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details or summary of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_metrics" (
  "task_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task-metric relationship */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related task */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related performance metric */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the task processing (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_task_metrics_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the event */,
  "event_details" TEXT /* Details of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric associated with the event */,
  "notification_details" TEXT /* Details of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
